expectations.evidence: Report: '[Critical] auth.go:18 — SQL injection in login query construction. Evidence: User-controlled email is interpolated into SQL via fmt.Sprintf.'
Report: '[Critical] auth.go:9 — Hardcoded JWT secret in source. Evidence: var jwtSecret = "super-secret-key-12345" is committed secret material.'
Report: '[Important] auth.go:23 — row.Scan error is ignored. Evidence: On missing user / DB error, id/hash remain zero values.'
